message:
fix(types): simplify PageData::into_vec to unconditional copy, clean up AsMut

PageData::into_vec previously attempted Arc::try_unwrap to avoid a copy
when the refcount is 1. With Arc<[u8]> (not Arc<Vec<u8>>), try_unwrap
yields a Box<[u8]> whose .into() conversion allocates a new Vec anyway,
making the optimization illusory. Simplified to always call
self.data.as_ref().to_vec() which is clearer and equivalent.

AsMut<[u8]> impl: Arc::make_mut(&mut self.data) already returns &mut [u8]
for Arc<[u8]>, so the trailing .as_mut_slice() was redundant. Removed.

Also reformats the u64 overflow compat test assertion for line length.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
